description_long: This object is a standard wooden pallet, commonly used for transporting and storing goods in urban and industrial environments. It is constructed from several parallel wooden planks on the top and bottom, with three thicker wooden blocks acting as spacers and supports, creating a raised platform. The pallet has open gaps between the planks, allowing for easy lifting by forklifts or pallet jacks from any side. The wood appears unfinished, with a natural, slightly weathered texture and visible grain patterns. The structure is robust and designed to support heavy loads, making it suitable for stacking and organizing materials in warehouses, garages, or outdoor storage areas. There are no visible handles, lids, or locking mechanisms, and the design is optimized for functionality and durability.
description: A sturdy, natural wood pallet with open slats and block supports, designed for stacking and transporting goods. The surface is unfinished and slightly weathered, suitable for industrial or urban storage.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full width of the pallet with six top planks and three supporting blocks underneath.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the depth and reveals the open gaps between the planks, as well as the thickness of the supporting blocks.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the same arrangement of planks and blocks, emphasizing the symmetrical design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, displaying the open structure and the alignment of the planks and blocks.
